findings.name: Logon Script Abuse Path
findings.description: Writable user IT-Admins can be pointed at SYSVOL logon script adstrike_6dba25cf.bat
findings.recommendation: Remove write rights on user scriptPath and restrict SYSVOL script writes

findings.name: Writable AD Objects
findings.description: bloodyAD get writable found modifiable AD objects; evaluate the matching abuse primitive
findings.recommendation: Remove unnecessary GenericWrite/WriteProperty from non-admin users

findings.name: SYSVOL Logon Script Path Reachable
findings.description: tester can browse SYSVOL scripts; combine writable user object with scriptPath
findings.recommendation: Restrict SYSVOL script write access and monitor scriptPath changes

findings.name: AS-REP Roastable Users
findings.recommendation: Enable Kerberos pre-authentication for all accounts

findings.name: Kerberoastable Accounts
findings.recommendation: Use gMSA; set 25+ char passwords on service accounts

findings.name: Coercion Attack Attempted
findings.description: Forced dc01.corp.local to authenticate to 192.168.56.100 — capture Net-NTLMv2 or relay
findings.recommendation: Enable EPA; disable WebClient service; block outbound SMB 445

findings.name: BloodHound JSON Collected
findings.description: BloodHound JSON files collected without zip archive.
findings.recommendation: Import JSON files into BloodHound or zip them manually.
